description:
Secure offline notes with AES-256 encryption and encrypted file attachments. NoteSR is a privacy-first, offline note app that keeps your data on your device. Create text notes, attach files, and open attachments directly in the app, all protected with AES-256 encryption. No account, no cloud sync, and no tracking.
  • Encrypted local storage for notes and attachments
  • Fully offline usage (no internet required)
  • Built-in viewer for common file types
  • Encrypted export/import for backup and restore
  • Simple, minimal interface focused on privacy
NoteSR is designed for people who want secure personal notes, journals, and sensitive files without giving up control of their data.
